title: Is Solar Worth It in Massachusetts?
description: Massachusetts can be a strong solar market, but the numbers depend on your bill, roof, utility, and current incentives.
quickAnswer: Solar may be worth it in Massachusetts for homeowners with higher electric bills, suitable roof space, and the ability to use current incentives.

scenario.title: Massachusetts Example
details: Battery optional depending on outage needs
Verify SMART, utility, and federal incentive details

faqs.question: Should I verify Massachusetts incentives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Incentive rules and budgets change, so confirm current details with a tax professional, installer, or official program source.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
